title: Americans' $800 Laptop Budgets Are Colliding With a $1,600 Reality, PCMag Survey Finds
summary: Meanwhile, 8% are looking to buy a budget laptop, such as a Chromebook or MacBook Neo; 8% intend to get a refurbished laptop; and 7% will repair or upgrade a laptop they already own.
